name: crypto
title: Crypto
description: An extension for generating cryptography related data such as hashes or UUIDs.
author: RichardDorian

commands.name: uuid-v4
commands.title: Generate UUID
commands.subtitle: Copies a random UUID to the clipboard
commands.description: This command generates a random version 4 UUID and copies it to the clipboard.

commands.name: hash
commands.title: Calculate Hash
commands.subtitle: Calculate the hash of the given text
commands.description: Calculate the hash of the provided text using multiple algorithms.
